snippet.description:
ж–°жӯҢдҫҶдәҶпјҢж„ҡдәәзҜҖеҝ«жЁӮрҹӨ“

дҪ жӣҫеҗҰиў«йЁҷз„¶еҫҢж„ҹиҰәеҝҝеҝҝдёҚе№іпјҹ

дҪ жӣҫеҗҰй©ҡеҳҶеҺҹдҫҶжңүдәәж’’и¬Ҡзҡ„иғҪеҠӣеј·еҲ°дёҚеҸҜжҖқиӯ°пјҹ

G.E.M.й„§зҙ«жЈӢжңҖж–°дҪңе“ҒгҖҲи¶…иғҪеҠӣгҖүд»Ҙи¶…иғҪеҠӣжҜ”е–»дёҚз•ҷз ҙз¶»зҡ„ж’’и¬ҠиғҪеҠӣгҖӮйӣ–з„¶еңЁзңӢз©ҝи¬ҠиЁҖеҫҢжңғгҖҢеҝғзўҺжҲҗз…ҷиҠұгҖҚпјҢ дҪҶе°ұеҰӮжӯҢи©һиӘӘзҡ„дёҖжЁЈгҖҢйӮЈи®“жҲ‘иӢҰдёӯдҪңжЁӮеҗ§гҖҚпјҢжҸӣеҖӢи§’еәҰпјҢ жҠҠйҖҷдәӣиҚ’и¬¬зҡ„дәӢжғ…з•¶жҲҗдёҖе ҙе№Ҫй»ҳзҡ„е–ңеҠҮпјҢ иҲүиө·йӣҷжүӢдҪҝеҮәжӢӣејҸдёҖиө·вҖңд»ЈжӣҝжңҲдә®ж¶Ҳж»…дҪ вҖқгҖӮй„§зҙ«жЈӢжғійҖҸйҒҺйҖҷйҰ–жӯҢжӣІеӮійҒ”еҚідҪҝз”ҹжҙ»иЈЎеҸҜиғҪжңғйҒҮеҲ°еҫҲеӨҡи®“дҪ еӮ·еҝғжҲ–жҶӨжҖ’зҡ„дәӢжғ…пјҢ дҪҶжҲ‘еҖ‘йӮ„жҳҜеҸҜд»ҘжҠҠдёҖеҲҮиҰ–дҪңз¬‘и©ұпјҢ еҰӮеҗҢй„§зҙ«жЈӢеңЁжӯҢжӣІзөҗе°ҫзҡ„з¬‘иҒІдёҖжЁЈпјҢ дёҖз¬‘зҪ®д№ӢпјҢз№јзәҢеҘҪеҘҪз”ҹжҙ»пјҒ

гҖҲи¶…иғҪеҠӣгҖүжҳҜG.E.M.й„§зҙ«жЈӢйҰ–ж”Ҝеҫ©еҸӨиҲһжӣІдҪңе“ҒпјҢйЎӣиҰҶеӨ§е®¶е°Қй„§зҙ«жЈӢеҫһеҮәйҒ“й–Ӣе§Ӣзҡ„жҗ–ж»ҫжөҒиЎҢгҖҒжғ…жӯҢеҸҠиҝ‘е№ҙиӘӘе”ұдҪңе“Ғзҡ„йҹіжЁӮеҚ°иұЎпјҢзӮәеӨ§е®¶её¶дҫҶиҖізӣ®дёҖж–°зҡ„ж„ҹиҰәгҖӮй„§зҙ«жЈӢеңЁжӯҢи©һе’Ңз·ЁжӣІдёӯзү№ж„ҸиЁӯиЁҲдәҶеҫҲеӨҡзҺ©е‘ізҡ„е…ғзҙ пјҢдҫӢеҰӮеүҜжӯҢжӯҢи©һдёӯзҡ„гҖҢд»ЈжӣҝжңҲдә®ж¶Ҳж»…дҪ гҖҚпјҢйқҲж„ҹдҫҶиҮӘеҘ№е°ҸжҷӮжңҖж„ӣзҡ„еӢ•жј«гҖҠзҫҺе°‘еҘіжҲ°еЈ«гҖӢпјӣз·ЁжӣІдёҠеүҮйҒӢз”ЁдәҶеӨҡзЁ®жҺЎжЁЈиҒІж•ҲпјҢдҫӢеҰӮзҲҶзӮёгҖҒйҒҠжҲІж©ҹзӯүпјҢеўһж·»жӯҢжӣІзҡ„и¶Је‘іиҲҮеұӨж¬ЎпјҢеёҢжңӣйҖҸйҒҺеҘҪзҺ©зҡ„ж°ӣеңҚпјҢйӮҖи«ӢеӨ§е®¶з¬‘зңӢйўЁйӣІгҖӮ

snippet.title: KALAU SAJA MAKANANMU JADI MANUSIA! || Tantangan Lucu Bertukar Tubuh oleh 123 GO! GOLD
snippet.description:
Anehnya situasi yang menyangkut makanan akan membuat harimu lebih baik dan menyelamatkan malammu dari santap malam membosankan!

Temukan cara memanjakan dirimu dengan permen lezat, cara bersenang-senang dengan tantangan lucu, dan berpura-pura dirimu menjadi anjing selama sehari penuh!

Sampai jumpa lagi! 

#123GOвҖӢ #GOLDвҖӢ #lucuвҖӢ #bertukartubuhвҖӢ

URUTAN WAKTU:
00:00вҖӢ Andai dietmu itu manusia
02:23вҖӢ Kiat makanan lucu dan kekonyolan epik dengan makanan: tantangan makanan
03:19вҖӢ Aku menjadi kucing selama 24 jam: tantangan lucu
05:28вҖӢ Kalau manusia bertingkah seperti anjing
08:19вҖӢ Satu hari menjadi cewek
10:27вҖӢ Dibuang sayang


BERLANGGANAN: https://bit.ly/3blXLA0
----------------------------------------------------------------

Musik oleh Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/

Sampel Foto: https://www.depositphotos.com 
https://www.shutterstock.com

Video ini ditujukan sebagai hiburan. Kami tidak menjamin kelengkapan, keamanan, dan kelayakan apa pun. Segala tindakan yang dilakukan berdasarkan informasi di video ini akan sepenuhnya menjadi risiko pelaku, dan kami tidak akan bertanggung jawab atas segala kerusakan dan kehilangan. Pemirsa bertanggung jawab penuh untuk menilai, merawat, dan melakukan tindak pencegahan jika berencana untuk meniru.

Video berikut ini mungkin menampilkan aktivitas yang dilakukan oleh aktor-aktor kami dalam lingkungan terkendali - mohon bertindak penuh pertimbangan, kewaspadaan, dan kehati-hatian apabila hendak meniru.

snippet.title: Warga emas maut diseret 3 kilometer
snippet.description:
Warga emas, Abu Samah@Mohd Tahir Singah, 80, maut selepas dia dan motosikal ditunggangnya diseret sejauh tiga kilometer oleh Nissan Frontier di Kilometer 10, Jalan Jerantut-Temerloh pagi Sabtu.

Dalam kejadian 8.30 pagi, mangsa maut di tempat kejadian akibat cedera di bahagian muka, bahu kiri dan tulang rusuk patah.

https://www.hmetro.com.my/utama/2021/04/693596/warga-emas-maut-diseret-3-kilometer-metrotv

snippet.title: а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ а®…а®©аҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®•а®©а®ҝ а®•а®ҫа®ЈаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ | а®өа®ҫа®ҷаҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ 2 а®®аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝа®Ҝ а®ӘаҜҠа®°аҜҒа®ҹаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ | а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ а®өа®°аҜҒа®ҹа®ӘаҜҚ а®Әа®ҝа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ 2021
snippet.description:
а®ҡа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҲ а®®а®ҫа®Өа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®Әа®ҝа®ұа®ЁаҜҚа®Өа®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ, а®•аҜҒа®ҙа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҲ а®ӘаҜҶа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®Әа®ҫа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ а®Әа®Өа®ҝа®өаҜҒ | Desa Mangayarkarasi
https://youtu.be/XxAB_XVBMZo

а®®а®°аҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ а®ЁаҜҖа®°а®ҫа®ҹа®ҝ а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲ а®өа®°а®өаҜҮа®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®өа®ҙа®ҝа®Әа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲ | а®•а®©а®ҝ а®•а®ҫа®ЈаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ | а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ а®өа®°аҜҒа®ҹ а®Әа®ҝа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ
https://youtu.be/0g00MJwEQNw

а®ҡаҜҶа®ІаҜҚа®өа®®аҜҚ, а®Ҷа®°аҜӢа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ, а®ЁаҜҖа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹ а®Ҷа®ҜаҜҒа®іаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҶа®ұ а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҲ а®өа®°а®өаҜҮа®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®өа®ҙа®ҝа®Әа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ұаҜҲ.   а®®аҜҮа®ІаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®•а®©а®ҝ а®•а®ҫа®ЈаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ, а®…а®ұаҜҒа®ҡаҜҒа®өаҜҲ а®үа®Ја®өаҜҒ а®Әа®ҹаҜҲа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ІаҜҚ, а®өа®ҙа®ҝа®Әа®ҹаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®ЁаҜҮа®°а®®аҜҚ а®Һа®© а®Әа®І а®Өа®•а®өа®ІаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҲ а®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҒа®®а®Өа®ҝ. а®ӨаҜҮа®ҡ а®®а®ҷаҜҚа®•аҜҲа®Ҝа®°аҜҚа®•аҜҚа®•а®°а®ҡа®ҝ а®…а®®аҜҚа®®а®ҫ а®…а®өа®°аҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ а®…а®іа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒа®іаҜҚа®іа®ҫа®°аҜҚ. 

- а®Ҷа®ӨаҜҚа®® а®һа®ҫа®© а®®аҜҲа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ 

# а®ҡа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®°аҜҲ а®•а®©а®ҝ а®•а®ҫа®ЈаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ 
# а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ а®өа®°аҜҒа®ҹ а®Әа®ҝа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ 
# Tamil New Year
# а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ

localized.title: а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚа®ӘаҜҚ а®ӘаҜҒа®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҫа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹаҜҒ а®…а®©аҜҚа®ұаҜҒ а®•а®©а®ҝ а®•а®ҫа®ЈаҜҒа®Өа®ІаҜҚ | а®өа®ҫа®ҷаҜҚа®• а®өаҜҮа®ЈаҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®Ҝ 2 а®®аҜҒа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҝа®Ҝ а®ӘаҜҠа®°аҜҒа®ҹаҜҚа®•а®іаҜҚ | а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ а®өа®°аҜҒа®ҹа®ӘаҜҚ а®Әа®ҝа®ұа®ӘаҜҚа®ӘаҜҒ 2021

snippet.title: Pernikahan Sultan Kelantan dengan Wanita Thailand
snippet.description: Sultan Kelantan Sultan Muhammad V terkenal kisah cintanya dengan Miss Rusia Oksana Voevodina. Tapi ramai tak tahu kalau Sultan Muhammad V Sultan Kelantan pernah menikah kahwin dengan wanita Thailand berasal dari kerajaan Pattani. Perempuan cantik itu menjadi istri Sultan Kelantan, dia bernama Kangsadal Pipitpakdee, kemudian berganti nama menjadi Tengku Zubaidah binti Tengku Norudin.

snippet.title: Arsy Nyanyikan Sebuah Lagu Spesial Untuk Sang Kakak - Ikatan Cinta Atta &Aurel Spesial Syukuran Akad
snippet.description:
Ikatan Cinta Atta & Aurel Spesial Syukuran Akad - 3 April 2021

Janji suci 2 ikon masa kini Atta Halilintar & Aurel Hermansyah  bersatu dalam satu cinta, hari istimewa dan spesial yang paling dinanti-nanti bagi mereka berdua. pesta kebahagiaan mereka bisa ikut dirasakan dan saksikan di #IkatanCintaAttadanAurelSpesialSyukuranAkad Tak Diduga!!! Arsy Berikan Sebuah Lagu Spesial Untuk Pernikahan Sang Kakak! Penampilannya Bikin Tamu Undangan Terkejut Dan Bersuka Cita #IkatanCintaAtta&AurelSpesialSyukuranAkad

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#PushpaвҖӢ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjunвҖӢ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #RashmikaвҖӢ #Faasil #SukumarвҖӢ #DSP #MythriMovieMakersвҖӢ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad

localized.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: Martina Cabut Nyawa Sultan
snippet.description:
Martina mendapat tugas dari malaikat untuk cabut nyawa sultan sombong yang dosanya full damage. Malaikat pencatat dosa menyamar jadi gembel untuk meminta sedekah dari sultan tapi sultan tidak mau ngasih. Martina langsung cabut nyawa sultan dan sultan bingung karena hartanya tidak dibawa. Sultan di bawa ke neraka sama iblis.

Character inspired by @Vernalta 

Makasih buat kak Vernando Altamirano untuk disain karakternya, aku sudah hubungi kak Vernalta lewat DM buat izin. Kata kak Vernalta udah liat dan dibolehin untuk memakai karakternya asal dicantumkan sumbernya. Makasih kak Nando baik banget ^^ semoga makin sukses yaa....
Kalian harus subscribe channel Vernalta dan dukung terus animasi - animasi Indonesia di Youtube ...
Link channel Vernalta aku tulis di bawah yaa... 

Channel Vernalta (Jangan Lupa Di Subs)

2:54 - SHIP HAPPENS 
Pencilmate wants to ship a package to Pencilmiss. Will it get there? 

6:34 - WHAT A CALL 
Pencilmate's waiting for a text back! How can Pencilmiss text so SLOW?!

9:34 - FRY SO SERIOUS?
Have we also mentioned that these burgeres are locally sourced, and completely greenhouse gas friendly? Pencilmate's the ULTIMATE FRY Cook!

12:51 - PRIMP MY RIDE 
Pencilmiss overslept her date! Will she get ready on time?!

15:18 - FAILURE TO LUNCH
Pencilmate has the longest sandwich ever! 

17:36 - BE FAIRY FAIRY QUIET
Mini Mate loses a tooth! With he finally get to meet the toothfairy? 

21:06 - TAG REFLEX
Pencilmate and Mini Mate play tag but... Mini Mate GOES MISSING?!

24:59 - IN PLANE SIGHT 
Pencilmate tries to fly a toy plane! How far will he get?

28:05 - REMOTE CONTROLLED
Pencilmate finds the best remote! Until Mini Mate gets his hands on it.

Is Pencilmate Smarter than a BABY? -in- "You Thumb Drive Me Crazy"| Pencilmation

ABOUT PENCILMATION :
Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвҖҷs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвҖҷs a vicious cycle.

ЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖ

snippet.description:
Lia Aziz merupakan seorang penyanyi baru yang mempertaruhkan lagu berbentuk pop yang bertajuk 'Kucu Kuca', single pertama beliau hasil ciptaan Ejai Azarra dan Afiez Azam.

Kucu Kuca
Lia Aziz
Lagu : Ejai Aziz
Lirik : Ejai Aziz
Publisher: MVM Production Sdn Bhd
Music Producer & Arranger : Afiez Azam
Vocal Producer : Ernie Zakri, Afiez Azam
Studio: Rusa Studio
Mixing: Vincent Chan

Art by  NotJustDessert

Art Team :  Amir Johari, Amina Shahirah, Fauzan Hak, Hazirah Rahman, Resha
Production Assistant: Darrien Danker, Jon THC, Amirul Rizuan, Nas Amirul
Make Up: Siew Keng & Yikki Yip
Sponsor: Sophea Rose, Geb.

Lirik 'Kucu Kuca' Lia Aziz:

Kelip bintang nun jauh dia sana
Sudah pastinya ku fikirkan dirimu
Deru angin bertiupan berlagu
Inginku sampai rinduan di hati

Lagu cinta ini untuk kamu
Sambilku tenung bulan menghiasi malam
Dan tercipta bibit kata indah
Dan lagukan rasaku

Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Serentak dengan nadaku
Bersama jari jemariku
Menyeru menari bersama diriku...

Namamu ku rahsiakan
Dan telah terpatri di hatiku
Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Opss alamak
Aku jatuh cinta

#KucuKuca #LiaAziz

snippet.title: ANANG & ASHANTY - CINTA TANPA SYARAT (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Sukses dengan album duet вҖңJodohkuвҖқ pada tahun 2011, single вҖңLuar BiasaвҖқ pada tahun 2019. Pada tahun 2021 ini Anang Hermansyah dan Ashanty kembali mengeluarkan single вҖңCinta Tanpa SyaratвҖқ. Hal ini tentunya merupakan persembahan istimewa untuk para penggemar dan penikmat musik
 
вҖңCinta Tanpa SyaratвҖқ adalah sebuah persembahan dari Anang Hermansyah dan Ashanty untuk pernikahan Aurelie Hermansyah dan Atta Halilintar. Lirik lagu ini ditulis oleh Ashanty, dan musik dalam lagu ini muncul dari ide Anang Hermansyah. Lagu ini tentang cinta kasih kedua orang tua untuk melepas anaknya yang akan menikah.

Musik Credit:
Produser : Ashanty
Artist вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ: Anang Hermansyah & Ashanty
Judul LaguвҖӢвҖӢ: Cinta Tanpa Syarat
ComposerвҖӢвҖӢ: Anang Hermansyah & Ashanty
ArransemenвҖӢвҖӢ: Reynaldo Iskandar & Adrijati Indi
Vocal DirectorвҖӢ  : Lucky Tampilang 
                           : Metha Zulia
Mixing & MasteringвҖӢ: Wawaz Akasah
ProduksiвҖӢвҖӢ: Hijau Music

Videographer : Ekky Meki & Team, Adrijati Indi

snippet.title: Kaka Azraff, Noki, Loca B - Gila | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

snippet.title: ROSГү - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
ItвҖҷs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it

snippet.title: CINTA KOLESTROL FULL MOVIE
snippet.description:
Filem ini mengisahkan tentang satu perjanjian di antara keluarga Haji Zaini dengan keluarga Dato' Osman yang ingin menjodohkan kedua-dua anak mereka satu hari nanti. Perjanjian ini dilafazkan setelah satu kejadian berlaku ketika Fazira (anak Dato' Osman) dan Ahmad Yusry (anak Haji Zaini) masih kecil. Dua puluh tahun kemudian, kedua-dua mereka meningkat dewasa. Yusry kini jejaka tampan berpendidikan tinggi serta baru pulang ke tanah air. Manakala Fazira, membesar sebagai seorang gadis yang sangat gemuk, mempunyai personaliti yang kurang menarik serta ketinggalan dari segi perkembangan fesyen semasa. Adakah Yusry dan Fazira bakal disatukan seperti mana perjanjian yang pernah dilafazkan antara dua keluarga, dan siapakah gadis jelita yang cuba dipikat oleh Yusry?

Awie Dan Sazzy Falak Bergandingan | Dari Kerana Mata 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mdV0Z...вҖӢ...

Korang Tahan Tak Kalau Dapat Boss Macam Ni?
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aM6K4...вҖӢ...

Filem Lu, Gua Bro !
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bmBtv...вҖӢ...

Ingat Lagi Tak Zaman Cinta Monyet Kat Kolej Dulu? | Main-Main Cinta
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KOOAF...вҖӢ...


 #CintaKolestrolвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #MigMovieвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ  #FullMovieвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #MigвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #MigPicturesвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #DavidTeoвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #MetrowealthвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ
